_help: Edit this file from your phone at https://github.com/mtodd78/wake-light (tap config.json, then the pencil icon, change values, Commit). The iPad re-checks every ~45s, even while armed, so changes apply ~1-2 min after you commit. Fields: time 'HH:MM' 24-hour, wakeColor (Purple/Violet/Indigo/Sunrise/Amber/Teal/Rose/White), nightColor (Amber/Yellow/Warm white/Peach/Red/Green), glow 0-100, fade 0-30 minutes, sound (Off/White/Pink/Brown), volume 0-100, arm true/false (true remotely starts the night; false ends it).
